warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points: Dress Code Violation, Penalty Points: Late Arrival). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Documents are free of spelling, punctuation, and grammatical errors
criteria.description: Written materials contain no mistakes in spelling, punctuation, or grammar.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The document contains at least three inaccuracies.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are two mistakes present.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The text has no spelling mistakes and a maximum of one error in either punctuation or grammar.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The writing is free of spelling and grammatical mistakes, with no more than one punctuation error.

criteria.name: Business & Academic Standards
criteria.description: Adherence to professional and educational benchmarks.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No benchmarks are specified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Benchmarks are listed, but they do not pertain to business or academic fields.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either professional or educational benchmarks are specified.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Professional benchmarks are identified and shown to relate to educational benchmarks.

criteria.name: Objectives (Competencies & Presentation Indicator)
criteria.description: Goals (Skills and Performance Metrics for the Presentation)

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No goals are provided.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Goals are stated, but they might not be precise or quantifiable.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Goals are clearly stated and can be specifically measured.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Goals are identified and correspond to important abilities or ideas crucial for students' education.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Neither a result nor its assessment is specified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either a result or its assessment is provided.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both a result and its assessment are provided.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The method for assessing the result aligns with the stated goals.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The assets and supplies are either not itemized or are unsuitable.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Assets and supplies are listed, but their implementation is not effective.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A variety of assets and supplies are itemized with precise citation details.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Assets and supplies are chosen or created to accommodate varied learning requirements.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The activity plan is too unclear or general to be useful.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The activity plan lacks necessary components or details for effective execution.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The activity plan is clear and structured to encourage critical thinking, problem-solving, or creativity.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The activity plan employs multiple approaches and includes guiding questions suitable for engaging students in advanced thought processes.

criteria.name: Substantiates and cites sources used while conducting research
criteria.description: Provides evidence for and references the sources utilized during research.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No sources are referenced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Sources or references are infrequently cited to support claims.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Credible professional sources and references that back up claims are generally present.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Strong evidence from credible professional sources and references is provided to support claims.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines (Asset)
criteria.description: Compliance with Rules: (All requirements must be satisfied) The lesson plan aligns with the assigned topic, was submitted as a PDF, links or QR codes were not used (except for citation purposes), and is no more than 3 pages long.

levels.label: Competitor Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor failed to meet the specified criteria.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: All requirements must be satisfied: The lesson plan aligns with the assigned topic, was submitted as a PDF, links or QR codes were not used (except for citation purposes), and is no more than 3 pages long.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the subject matter was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A restricted comprehension of the subject matter was exhibited.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: An understanding of the subject matter was exhibited.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: An extensive understanding of the subject matter was exhibited.

criteria.name: Presented material met the objectives of the lesson plan
criteria.description: The content presented fulfilled the goals of the lesson plan.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No content was presented, or objectives were not stated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Content was presented, but it did not align with the declared lesson plan objectives.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Content was presented and aligned with the declared lesson plan objectives.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Materials fulfill the stated objectives and cater to differences among learners.

criteria.name: Presented material appropriate for audience and subject
criteria.description: The content presented is suitable for the intended audience and topic.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Activities or materials are not included or are unsuitable for the grade level or topic.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Activities or materials are included but do not offer students clear chances for guided practice.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Activities or materials are included and provide students with opportunities for practice.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Activities or materials engage and motivate students with opportunities to showcase skills.

criteria.name: Presented interesting, motivating and creative lesson plan
criteria.description: Delivered an engaging, inspiring, and imaginative lesson plan.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The lesson plan lacks structure.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The lesson plan is structured.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The lesson plan is structured; and is either engaging, inspiring, OR imaginative.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The lesson plan is structured, engaging, inspiring, imaginative, and presented in a professional manner.

criteria.name: Substantiates and cites sources used while conducting research
criteria.description: Provides evidence for and references the sources utilized during research.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No sources are referenced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Sources or references are infrequently cited to support claims.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Credible professional sources and references that back up claims are generally present.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Strong evidence from credible professional sources and references is provided to support claims.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Consistently exhibits self-assurance, composed body language, captivating eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed abilities were shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the listed abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were shown.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the listed abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were shown.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were shown, improving the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates proper verbal and nonverbal communication skills
criteria.description: Exhibits appropriate spoken and unspoken communication abilities.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Both spoken and unspoken communication abilities are unsuitable.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Spoken and/or unspoken communication abilities are weak or distracting.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: All inquiries were clearly addressed using correct grammar and suitable body language.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Spoken communication abilities are outstanding; unspoken communication is effortless.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to answer questions proficiently.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Does not reply to questions or replies are entirely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides incomplete or unclear replies that indicate limited comprehension.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient comprehension.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful replies that enhance the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines (Presentation)
criteria.description: Compliance with Rules: (All requirements must be satisfied) Only permitted technology devices were used (size specifications were followed; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time), the presentation aligned with the assigned topic, professional boundaries were maintained during setup time (no interaction with judges), no materials were left behind after the presentation, links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges), audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round), and the use of food or live animals was avoided.

levels.label: Competitor Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor failed to meet the specified criteria.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: All requirements must be satisfied: Only permitted technology devices were used (size specifications were followed; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time), the presentation aligned with the assigned topic, professional boundaries were maintained during setup time (no interaction with judges), no materials were left behind after the presentation, links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges), audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round), and the use of food or live animals was avoided.
